text:
is an aircraft that appears in the Evangelion THE FLIGHT. It also known by the technical name .

Profile

It is based on the aircraft owned by Fuji Airways - 4D Ride, and it is more movable with better specifications than the previous version. The passengers can enjoy the air travel by experiencing the wind blows as they are sit in the wings.

History

Evangelion THE FLIGHT

During the briefing made by Misato, it is given the information about it, then when the it is piloted by its captain, Mari Makinami Illustrious, during a visit to the NERV Fuj-Q Branch. It is attacked by a Angel as the three Evangelions tries to protect it.
